content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 4.5.1–4.5.3 WARN — HomeKit framework imported and HMHomeManager instantiated in a wallpaper browsing app with no home-automation UI (App/WallpaperGridView.swift:1-8); the view only lists wallpaper categories, unrelated to HomeKit.
Pierre: Apple requires apps requesting the HomeKit entitlement to actually provide home-automation functionality to the user; an unused `HMHomeManager` instance in an unrelated wallpaper app looks like misuse of a sensitive entitlement and may trigger review questions or rejection. This will also prompt an unnecessary home data access permission dialog for users. Please remove the HomeKit import/entitlement if it's leftover from a template, or implement genuine home-related features if intended.
